multiplechoiceresponse.label: In this Random Forest, oldpeak has the highest feature importance. What is the best interpretation?

choicegroup.choice: Increasing oldpeak increases predicted heart disease risk.
oldpeak is frequently used across the forest to make informative splits that reduce impurity.
oldpeak alone is enough to perfectly predict the outcome.

div.p: Default Random Forest feature importance (in scikit-learn) is typically “mean decrease in impurity”: features get more importance if they are used often and lead to large reductions in impurity across many trees. Importances do not provide direction (unlike logistic regression coefficients), do not imply causality, and do not mean the feature is sufficient by itself.
